global.title: 4.5 GW: A big US solar cell factory is coming to South Carolina
global.summary: Suniva is planning a major expansion in US solar manufacturing, with a new 4.5-gigawatt (GW) solar cell factory coming to Laurens, South Carolina. more…

global.title: Ford reshuffles EV unit, Doug Field out as Farley chases 8% margin
global.summary: Ford is reorganizing its standalone electric vehicle division — and losing the executive who built it. global.title: Volkswagen’s affordable electric SUV leaks [Images]
global.summary: Volkswagen is preparing to introduce a new entry-level electric SUV to sit below the ID.4. With its launch coming up, images of the ID. Cross leaked online, revealing the new design. more…

global.title: Solid-state EV batteries are coming sooner than expected after another breakthrough
global.summary: After achieving a breakthrough earlier this week, Greater Bay Technology said it aims to launch the world’s first mass-producible all-solid-state battery this year. more…

global.title: Velotric Earth Day e-bike sale offers up to $562 savings, score up to $6,822 savings on EcoFlow DELTA Pro Ultra + X power stations, more
global.summary: Leading our mid-week Green Deals is Velotric’s Earth Day e-bike sale with up to $562 savings, like the Fold 1 Plus Folding e-bike that is getting a FREE cargo rack seat pad at its $1,399 low, among other models. global.title: Hyundai’s affordable EV hot hatch is almost here: Here’s our best look at it [Video]
global.summary: Hyundai will unveil the IONIQ 3 during Milan Design Week in less than a week. Ahead of its debut, we are getting a sneak peek of the electric hot hatch after it was spotted parked in a garage. more…

global.title: Tesla ‘Full Self-Driving’ crashed through railroad gate seconds before train
global.summary: A Texas Tesla owner says he punched the accelerator to outrun an oncoming train after his car on “Full Self-Driving” drove itself through a lowered railroad crossing arm as the train closed in on the tracks. global.title: BYD is now upgrading some of its top selling EVs with 5-min flash charging
global.summary: BYD launched its new Flash Charging system, enabling EV charging in as little as 5 minutes, in luxury vehicles like the Denza Z9 GT. Now, it’s set to roll out to some of its best sellers. more…

global.title: Tesla taped out AI5 chip, Musk says — nearly 2 years behind schedule
global.summary: Tesla has taped out its next-generation AI5 self-driving chip, CEO Elon Musk said overnight, a key milestone that sends the final design to the foundry for fabrication. The tape-out comes nearly two years after Tesla originally promised AI5 would be in vehicles, and it still leaves volume production

global.title: Volkswagen upgrades the ID.3 EV with a new name, new style, and nearly 400 miles range
global.summary: The first “true Volkswagen” is here. Volkswagen revealed the all-new ID.3 Neo with extensive upgrades, including a refined interior and exterior design and a driving range of nearly 400 miles (630 km) on a single charge. more…
